geopolitics_summary: Iran war driving EU energy policy acceleration; fresh sanctions on Russian shadow fleet; US-EU trade tensions on climate rules weakening.

themes.headline: Portugal fast-tracks fossil fuel halving; Iran war spikes oil/gas costs
themes.why_it_matters: Iran war cost spike triggering front-loaded EU decarbonisation demand. Accelerates gas-to-power switch & renewable build; short-term support for coal & gas spark spreads as policy risk rises on fuel costs.

themes.headline: EU doubles down on carbon tax for international flights amid US opposition
themes.why_it_matters: Strengthens EU ETS scarcity narrative & carbon floor; signals EU resolve on climate despite Trump pressure. Minor direct power impact; flags regulatory momentum driving cap tightening.

themes.headline: EU softens methane regulation enforcement under US pressure
themes.why_it_matters: Weakens upstream emissions controls; could increase EU gas supply via reduced flaring penalties, easing TTF cost-floor pressure. Signals policy retreat on climate, reducing scarcity premiums on carbon.

themes.headline: EU sanctions blitz targets Putin's shadow fleet and Russia banks
themes.why_it_matters: Restricts Russian oil export capacity; tightens LNG arb window into Europe. Supports crude & Brent; indirect upward pressure on EU generation cost via fuel switching and heating oil prices near heating season.

themes.headline: NATO backs renewables for energy security despite US skepticism
themes.why_it_matters: Signals NATO-wide renewable acceleration & decarbonisation mandates. Long-term supply-curve pressure on power; near-term risk of construction delays if anti-wind campaigns gain political traction in EU.

watchlist: EU methane enforcement rollback timeline and scope — desk-relevant for gas supply cost-floor.
Iran war oil/LNG price persistence — direct TTF arb & power spark spread trigger.
US-EU trade negotiations on climate rules — signals policy regime shifts affecting EUA floor.
Anti-wind campaign momentum across EU — construction risk for renewable capacity targets.
